notableEvents.label: Jesús Sánchez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jesús Sánchez grounds into a double play, shortstop Brooks Lee to first baseman Josh Bell. George Springer out at 2nd. Jesús Sánchez out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Yohendrick Piñango reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by first baseman Josh Bell. Daulton Varsho scores. Lenyn Sosa scores. Yohendrick Piñango to 2nd. Throwing error by first baseman Josh Bell.
